name: AudioProctor
description: Secure audio and text assessment player for managed Chromebooks

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; connect-src https://audioproctor.com https://www.audioproctor.com https://app.audioproctor.com https://*.supabase.co; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co; media-src https://*.supabase.co;
